title: control
description: Client -> daemon control frame (~50 Hz). May bundle any subset of jog/action/reset/clutch. seq is for ordering/dedup; send_ms is for latency display only -- neither feeds the safety watchdog.

send_ms.description: Client send time (epoch ms). Latency display only.

action_id.description: PROPOSED (Phase E / G1). Correlator for a motion-bearing frame; the daemon echoes it in action_status transitions (accepted->active->done|blocked|clamped|timeout). Optional; ignored if the daemon predates Phase E.

armJog.description: 6-DOF task space (rpi4 SimpleTeleopArm). x/y -> IK(shoulder_lift,elbow_flex); pitch -> wrist_flex coupling.

action.description: Absolute lerobot action dict (laptop-side IK path). Keys are <motor>.pos / <axis>.vel in the declared norm_mode.

leaderActionDeg.description: Absolute SO101 leader-arm targets: body joints in DEGREES around the calibrated leader zero; grippers normalized [0,100]. Keys may be <motor> or <motor>.pos. The daemon converts to normalized units via the follower calibration, applies a server-side slew guard (NORI_LEADER_SLEW), then feeds the same TeleopArm P-control/safety path as `action`. Applied after `action` when both are present (leader wins on shared keys).

clutch.description: VR squeeze-to-move (M2). When false, the laptop mapper emits zero jog.
